name: logistics supervisors at freight carriers processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For logistics supervisors at freight carriers processing 10-20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause supplier penalties. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and shipment records.
target_audience: logistics supervisors at freight carriers processing 10-20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Discrepancies between freight invoices and shipment records
